    In this region, the beauty of the moon and flowers surpasses all of Jiangnan, and guests can freely explore the myriad colors and forms. Walking through the thirty li of Zhangtai, no one does not speak of Li Sansan. Her heart is very eager to seek spring, and she is intoxicated among the flowers, as if a clumsy butterfly. Having seen all the full-bodied and slender beauties, none can match Li Sansan in charm. Her radiant beauty and subtle fragrance overwhelm all the other flowers, and she certainly does not feel ashamed. I wish to set up ten thousand golden bells to protect Li Sansan deeply. Remembering from north of the river to south of the river, she does not count among the famous flowers but explores them casually. Thin is clear and emaciated, fat is vulgar; who compares in appearance to Li Sansan?

    642

    银灯斜背酒初酣，半带娇羞半带憨。醉后销魂醒后忆，多情谁似李三三。眉如欲语意犹含，偶话前情便自惭。同倚薰笼呵冻笔，唱酬谁似李三三。谪仙游戏到江南，北里花名着意探。除却怜才殷七七，深情又付李三三。好花初放酒初酣，半露娇羞半露憨。一样梅花枝上月，二分已照李三三。笋怜新粉箨犹含，消受髯苏句不惭。读到清平三绝句，瑶台应属李三三。一枝艳表江南，忍舍名花不细探。除却姚黄能绝代，更无人可敌三三。不辞绿醑十分酣，拼对红妆一味憨。日者算侬饶唤福，岂真消受到三三。怜才一念两心含，未报私恩每自惭。与月同圆筹七七，愿花常好祝三三。

    Explanation

    642

    A Silver Lamp and Intoxication

    Holding a silver lamp at an angle, she is just beginning to get drunk, half shy and half innocent. After drinking, she is soul-destroying, remembered upon waking, and who can match the deep affection of Li San San? Her eyebrows seem to want to speak but still hold back meaning, and when she casually talks about past events, she feels ashamed. Together, they lean near a warming device, trying to warm their frozen writing tools, and who can match the poetic exchanges of Li San San? Like a banished immortal enjoying leisure in the south, she explores the famous flowers of the northern district with intent. Except for the admiration for talent like Yin Qiqi, deep feelings are again given to Li San San. Beautiful flowers are just beginning to bloom, and she is just beginning to get drunk, half shy and half innocent. Like the moon on a plum branch, two parts have already illuminated Li San San. Bamboo shoots, with their new white sheaths still intact, are enjoyed without shame, appreciating the beard of Su (a reference to Su Shi). Reading three exceptional poems from the Qingping collection, the jade terrace should belong to Li San San. A beautiful flower representing the south, how can one resist exploring the famous flowers without careful examination? Except for Yao Huang, who can surpass the era? There is no one else who can match Li San San. Not hesitating to drink green wine to the fullest, facing the red dress with a single-minded naivety. The fortune-teller says that you have plenty of good luck, is it truly the case that the good fortune reaches Li San San? A thought of appreciating talent holds two hearts, not repaying private favors often makes one feel ashamed. To plan together with the moon, seven by seven, to wish the flowers always beautiful, blessing Li San San.

    643

    姚倩卿小传
    　　
    　　蕙兰心性玉丰姿，能占东风第一枝。修到几生香梦里，不教轻薄蝶蜂知。倩卿，即吴门百艳图中姚小七也。春色一枝，移来海上，居普庆里，为二爱仙人李芋仙所赏识。授以吟咏，有知己之感。芋仙病于寓邸，姬遣侍儿迭问，并馈绨袍。芋仙有句云：半旬小极旷招寻，青鸟频来探好音。传语一言三致意，善调眠食善安心。绨袍风味女儿箱，罗绮丛中侠骨香。能使美人怜到底，只须一副好心肠。常品名花十友，以姬为梅花清友，赠句云：绰约一处子，见之汾水阳。

    Explanation

    643

    姚倩卿小传

    She possesses the heart and nature of orchid and lily, with a graceful and noble appearance, capable of being the first to enjoy the spring breeze. Her beauty and grace are the result of many lifetimes of cultivation, like a fragrant dream, and she is not to be trivialized or taken lightly. Qingqing, also known as Yao Xiaoshi in the famous painting "Hundred Beauties of Wu Gate," is a woman whose beauty and grace are like a branch of spring, moved to a coastal area, and residing in Puqing Lane. She is appreciated and supported by the patron and close friend, Er Ai Immortal Li Yuxian. He teaches her to write poetry, expressing a sense of deep understanding and appreciation. When Li Yuxian falls ill in his residence, Qingqing sends a servant to inquire about his well-being and sends a warm, coarse fabric as a gift. Li Yuxian writes: "For half a month, I have been weak and unable to see you, but the bluebird frequently comes to inquire about your good news. Convey my message with three expressions of concern, and take care of your diet and rest. The warmth and care of the warm, coarse fabric in the young lady's box, amidst the silk and brocade, carries the fragrance of a chivalrous heart. To make a beautiful person truly care, one needs only a kind and caring heart. He often lists ten friends among beautiful flowers, placing Qingqing as a clear friend of the plum blossom, and gives her a poetic line: 'Graceful and elegant, she is seen by the banks of the Fen River.'

    644

    人间堪独立，海上对孤芳。兰有同心语，梅无媚世妆。频年知己少，无使遇南湘。七绝云：推解高风不可寻，恰从闺阁遇知音。一缣漫说区区意，总是怜才念旧心。搜残黄竹女儿箱，隐隐犹余百和香。蜀缬他年同此爱，莫教秋雨断柔肠。此情深比水千寻，难得蛾眉属赏音。愧煞一般豪贵客，寒暄不问托知心。解衣亲启镂金箱，博得风尘姓氏香。秋雨秋风凉已遍，那知独热美人肠。司香旧尉赠云：不是娇羞不是狂，一般酬应寸心量。风尘独创怜才格，红拂偏教识李郎。修来颜色自倾城，百艳图中早列名。

    Explanation

    644

    In the world, one can stand alone, facing the solitary beauty of the sea. Orchids speak with hearts in harmony, while plums lack the charm to please the world. Over many years, true friends are few; do not meet the distant and unattainable. The seven-character quatrain says: noble character is hard to find, yet it is discovered within the home of a woman. With a single bolt of silk, one can speak of small intentions, always cherishing talent and remembering old friends. Searching through the remnants of a woman's box, a faint fragrance of a hundred scents remains. In the future, this love will be shared, but do not let the autumn rain break the tender heart. This emotion is deeper than a thousand fathoms of water, rare is the beautiful eyebrow who understands the true heart. Shameful are the usual wealthy guests, who do not entrust their hearts in casual greetings. Removing one's clothes to open a finely crafted box, one gains the fragrance of the world's name. The autumn rain and wind have already spread their chill, yet who knows the tender heart of a beautiful woman? The old official responsible for incense says: not shy nor wild, one measures responses with a true heart. In the world of dust, one creates a unique character for cherishing talent, and the Red Silk teaches the recognition of Li Lang. Cultivating one's appearance naturally makes the city turn, and one is already listed among the hundred beauties in the picture.

    645

    怪底大家推重甚，不怜豪杰则怜卿。露蕊含苞茁一枝，盈盈浅笑昵人知。生成眉眼天然好，况是垂髻十五时。池莲居士选句云：琴川女郎年十七，绰约如花真艳绝。有人花府学秦宫，飞上枝头变蝴蝶。眼波一转秋水清，眉黛一扫春山横。尊前替谱临春乐，琼树森森碧水明。一轮碧月终宵满，手拨檀槽声缓缓。自怜一串好歌喉，那知座中肠欲断。忆昔侬来北里游，宝儿弦索巧儿讴。而今身价千金重，不与寻常一例俦。辛已花榜，列居二甲第一名，品云：“清新隽永。

    Explanation

    645

    A Woman of Uncommon Beauty and Talent

    Strange indeed that the great ones hold her in such high esteem, either they pity the heroes or they pity her. A flower bud about to bloom, nurturing one branch, her gentle smile is known by those who are close to her. Her eyebrows and eyes are naturally beautiful, especially when she is fifteen and still wears her hair in a child's style. The Pool Lotus Scholar selected these lines: A young woman from Qínchuān, aged seventeen, graceful and beautiful, truly unparalleled in her beauty. Some people learn in the palace of Qin, flying up to the branch and transforming into a butterfly. Her eyes, like clear autumn water, turn with a glance, her eyebrows, like the mountains of spring, are swept across. At the feast, she composes the music of spring, the jade-like trees stand tall, and the green water is clear. A full green moon shines all night, with her hands, she gently plays the strings. She laments her own beautiful singing voice, who knows if the audience will be moved to tears. Remembering when I came to play in the northern market, the skilled musician plays the strings, and the clever singer sings. Now, her value is worth a thousand gold pieces, not to be compared with ordinary people. In the flower list of the year Xīnyǐ, she ranked first in the second category, it is described as "fresh and enduring."

    646

    ”壬午花朝艳榜，首冠群芳，奖曰：“侠骨仙心，高立尘表。”姬性孤高，颇以身价自矜，遇寻常客，大有燕叱莺嗔之态。余尝数饮其家，室中陈设，琴几貌鼎，墨宝笔床，诗书数卷，拓碑几本，盖芋仙为之位置也。吁嗟！自古名妓，必得文人为之标榜，庶可享盛名，傲侪辈；美人词客，共著芳声。芋仙之于倩卿，可谓至矣。犹记其临别句云：未知后会从何地，且结来生未了因。自芋仙去后，倩卿系铃乏人，未免门前冷落，车马稀疏，余不禁感慨系之。癸未冬季，花榜评云：“清歌妙曲，风度翩翩。”

    Explanation

    646

    On the day of the Flower Festival in the year Renwu, the list of talented individuals was announced, and she stood out among all the flowers, receiving the commendation: "With a noble spirit and a pure heart, she stands above the mundane world." The courtesan was solitary and proud, taking great pride in her own value. When encountering ordinary guests, she treated them with a haughty and disdainful manner. I have often visited her home, where the room was elegantly decorated with musical instruments, writing tools, calligraphy, and books. This arrangement was done by Master Yu. Alas! From ancient times, famous courtesans must be praised by literati to gain fame and respect among their peers; beautiful women and poets together establish a good reputation. Master Yu's role in arranging the room for Qianqing can truly be considered exemplary. I still remember her parting words: "I do not know where we will meet again, but let us bind our karmic connection for a future life." After Master Yu left, without someone to maintain her, the courtyard became desolate, and few visitors came. I could not help but feel a deep sense of loss. In the winter of the year Guiwei, the talent list announced: "Her singing and music are clear and melodious, and her demeanor is graceful and elegant."

    647

    郑素琴小纪
    　　
    　　梨云别梦最悲辛，花谢春归证夙因。莫道殿春春事了，伤心更有倚楼人。郑素琴，苏州人，即上海之名校书袁云仙也。于甲午委身某大令，怜卿怜我，闻者艳之。大令以娶姬故，为上游所闻，因之撤委闲居。姬甘为食贫，常作女红，以助日用。双栖玳瑁，几及十年。讵意好事多磨，彩云易散。辛已夏，大令襄办海运，覆舟遇拯，而二竖灾侵，三灵降谴，良医送束手，药石无功，竟捐馆于沪江旅次。客囊如洗，宦态炎凉；衔悲称贷，竭力摒挡。一坯黄土，旅榇得埋。死则已矣，生何以堪！天壤茫茫，欲归何之？且以积累故，避债无台。

    Explanation

    647

    A Brief Account of Zheng Suqin
    　　
    The farewell dream of pear clouds is the most sorrowful, the withering of flowers and the departure of spring prove predestined fate. Do not say that spring is over when it has reached its peak, for there is still someone who is heartbroken, leaning on a tower. Zheng Suqin, a woman from Suzhou, is none other than the renowned courtesan Yuan Yunxian from Shanghai. In the year of Jia Wu, she dedicated herself to a high-ranking official, and their mutual affection was admired by all who heard of it. The official was dismissed from his post due to his marriage to a concubine, and he was forced into retirement. The concubine willingly lived a simple and frugal life, often doing women's work to support their daily needs. They lived together in harmony for nearly ten years. Alas, good things often face difficulties, and beautiful things are fleeting. In the summer of Xin Si, the official was involved in maritime affairs and was saved after a shipwreck. However, he was afflicted by illness, and divine retribution came upon him. Even the best physicians were helpless, and medicines and remedies were ineffective. He ultimately passed away in a hotel in Shanghai. His pockets were empty, and the world was cold and indifferent; he borrowed money while grieving and made every effort to handle the matters. A mound of earth was dug, and the coffin was buried. If death is the end, how can one bear to live? The vastness of heaven and earth, where can one return? And due to accumulated debts, there is no place to hide.

    648

    不得已，风尘复堕，犹喜昔日艳名，犹噪人耳。虽浔阳征妇，老去秋娘，当其淡妆素服，姗姗而来，丰韵尚存。且四弦入抱，一曲登场，破香唇而吐莺声，尚有铿金裂竹之妙；能使躁者静心，狂者摄气，座客莫不意畅神舒，故趋之若鹜。更有愿入门墙，作女弟子者。得雏鬟四人，贽币千金。依然名重花城，为风月场领袖。湖人某，最爱昵之，壬午花榜评云：“能兼，顽艳均感。”龙湫旧隐为赋琵琶歌以赠云：江楼夜半烧红烛，聒耳声多压丝竹。忽听琵琶叹绝奇，当筵肠断秋娘曲。秋娘昔日擅风姿，名艳司花袁宝儿。水上洛妃来渺渺，云中仙子步迟迟。破瓜年纪娇无比，家本苏台几迁徙。

    Explanation

    648

    Unavoidably, she fell back into the world of courtesans, yet she still delighted in her former fame, which still caused a stir among people. Though she was once a courtesan from Xunyang and had aged like Qiuniang, when she came gracefully dressed in simple attire, her charm still remained. Moreover, holding the four-stringed instrument, she performed a piece, speaking through sweet lips like a nightingale, and still possessed the marvelous sound of breaking metal and splitting bamboo. Her music could make the restless calm down and the wild control their breath; the guests all felt their minds at ease and spirits relaxed, thus they flocked to her like ducks. There were also those who wished to enter the inner circle and become her female disciples. She received four young girls and a thousand pieces of gold as gifts. She still held great prestige in the city of flowers and was the leader of the entertainment scene. A certain person from Lake Country loved her dearly. The flower list of the year Renwu commented: "She can combine both, and both the stubborn and the beautiful are moved." The old hermit of Longqiu composed a poem to give her, which said: In the middle of the night at the riverside pavilion, red candles are lit, the loud sounds overshadow the music of strings and pipes. Suddenly hearing the pipa, it is truly extraordinary, at the banquet, the song of Qiuniang breaks hearts. Qiuniang was once known for her grace, the beautiful and famous Yuan Ba'er. Like the fairy of the Luo River coming from afar, like a fairy in the clouds walking slowly. In her prime, she is incredibly charming, her family originally lived in Suzhou and moved several times.

    649

    一顾能空冀北群，十年小住城南里。琵琶巷中卜芳居，不让桥边旧校书。深巷春风藏绣幕，当门终日满香车。登场偶把新声赌，唱到黄河谁与伍。莺词间关试晓晴，祣弦嘹亮惊宵雨。此时身价重连城，此际风华一座倾。赢得五陵年少子，无人不愿识卿卿。识卿之心早有属，一枝欲自依乔木。小玉何缘嫁十郎，红颜命薄终非福。叹息郎君遽弃官，居贫十载又离鸾。飘零身世谁堪托，重抱檀槽掩泪弹。一弹一泪声凄切，盘内明珠抛瑟瑟。落花江南鸟自啼，雪飞塞北人长别。我亦当年识面人，闻歌不觉暗伤神。江州泪渍衫痕旧，杜牧诗添鬓影新。相逢今已更名字，缟素妆成有深意。

    Explanation

    649

    A single glance could make the herd in Jibei empty, and she spent ten years living in the southern part of the city. She divided her dwelling in the Pipa Alley, not inferior to the old schoolgirl by the bridge. The spring wind hides behind the embroidered curtains in the deep alley, and throughout the day, her door is filled with perfumed carriages. Occasionally, she would perform new songs on stage, and when she sang about the Yellow River, who could match her? The oriole's song tested the dawn's clarity, and the loud strings startled the midnight rain. At this moment, her value was as high as the price of multiple cities, and at this time, her beauty and charm captivated everyone in the audience. She won the admiration of the young men from the Five Tombs, and no one would not want to know her. Her heart was already committed to someone, and she wanted to rely on a tall tree. Why did Xiao Yu marry Shilang? Her beauty was destined for a short life, which was not a blessing. She sighed at her husband's sudden resignation, and she lived in poverty for ten years and was separated from her husband. Her wandering life and uncertain fate left her with no one to rely on, and she once again held the lute and played it while shedding tears. Each note was accompanied by a tear, and the sound was heart-wrenching. The pearls in her jewelry box were thrown away, sparkling. Falling flowers in Jiangnan, birds sing on their own, and snow falls in the northern border, people are long gone. I too was someone who knew her face, and hearing her songs, I couldn't help but feel deeply moved. The old stains of tears on my shirt from Jiangzhou, and new gray hair added to my appearance by Du Mu's poetry. Meeting her again, we have changed our names, dressed in white, there is a deep meaning.

    650

    老大空教作技师，妖韶犹是余风致。听残我独动悲歌，自古须眉失节多。燕子楼中人有几，莫将负义责青蛾。梁溪瘦鹤词人赠句云：好因缘是恶因缘，容易欢喜是少年。况是徐娘悲老大，何堪重理四条弦。生成薄命奈天何，往事思量眼欲波。红袖青衫同一辙，人间大半寡恩多。一曲收场恨欲深，玉颜肮脏可怜春。而今世局翻新样，真个多情有几人。又抱琵琶过别舟，更谁青眼识风流。飘零我类商人妇，两样遭逢一样愁。姬初居西公兴，迁北荣里，旧时蜂蝶，争相问津。门前车马，蚁聚蜂屯。癸未中秋后三日，鉴湖韫玉生，又作藏娇之主。从此护花有，正不必江州司马，泪湿青衫也。

    Explanation

    650

    In vain, old age teaches one to be a technician; lingering charm remains. Hearing something incomplete, I alone stir a sorrowful song; throughout history, many men have lost their virtue. How many people remain in the story of the "Yan Zi Tower"? Do not blame young women for acts of disloyalty. A poet from Liangxi, a thin, elderly man, said: "A good karmic connection is a bad one; easily happy is the young man." A middle-aged woman laments her aging; how can one bear to play the instrument again? Fate is thin; what can one do about it? Thinking about past events makes one's eyes tear up. Men and women are on the same path; most people in the human world lack kindness. The end of a song brings deep resentment; a beautiful face becomes dirty and pitiful in spring. The current world situation has turned into a new form; truly many people are emotional. Holding a pipa and passing by another boat; who else will give a favorable look and recognize charm? Wandering like a merchant's wife; two kinds of encounters bring the same sorrow. Initially, the lady lived in Xigong, then moved to Beirongli; former admirers flocked to her. Carriages and horses gathered before her door, like ants and bees. Three days after the Mid-Autumn Festival in the year Guiwei, Yin Yu from Jianhu became her new lover, once again taking her as his cherished concubine. From now on, there is protection for the flower; there is no need for the Jiangzhou司马, with tears wetting his green robe.

    651

    马双珠小传
    　　
    　　粉黛三分淡着肤，自怜身小倩郎扶。莫嫌缘绝天台路，洞里春光也可娱。马双珠，东乡人，初居曲江里。其母秀卿，姐凤珠，皆工串剧。自沈仲复方伯分巡沪滨时，禁止女剧后，以朱为紫，事本甚易，拔帜易帜，遂以女优改女闾。时凤珠嫁去，姬与张小宝同时称瑜亮焉。年十五，貌清秀，秋波俏转，春意融然。余友咏梅子，素号端谨，于姬独垂青眼。癸未冬季，花榜奖云：“步步娇。”赠联云：“双髻云蟠，豁开冀野空群目；珠楼月堕，誓忏扬州薄幸身。

    Explanation

    651

    Biography of Ma Shuangzhu

    Her face, lightly adorned with cosmetics, she laments her small stature and asks her lover for support. Do not be disheartened by the end of your romantic path, for the spring light within the cave can still bring joy. Ma Shuangzhu was from the eastern region and originally lived in Qujiang Village. Her mother, Xiuqing, and her sister, Fengzhu, were all skilled in performing plays. When Governor Shen Zhongfu, during his inspection of Shanghai, banned female performers, he changed the red to purple, a matter that was quite easy to accomplish, thus transforming female performers into prostitutes. At the time, Fengzhu had married, but Ma Shuangzhu and Zhang Xiaobao were simultaneously renowned as the best in their field. At fifteen years old, she was graceful and beautiful, her eyes sparkling with spring-like charm. My friend, Yumei Zi, who is usually known for his seriousness, had a particular fondness for her. In the winter of the year Guiwei, she was awarded the title "Step by Step Beauty" on the flower list. A couplet was also given: "Her twin braids coiled like clouds, opening up the vast plain to everyone's gaze; the moon fell from the pearl tower, vowing to atone for her unfaithful life in Yangzhou."

    652

    ”雾里看花客尝饮其室，当筵赠句云：画楼今夜启琼筵，碧玉盈盈正妙年。听到东乡花鼓调，始知卿自有家传。凤珠已嫁巧珠小，唯有双珠最可人。看遍沪滨花万朵，红红绿绿不成春。饯春客赠云：菱花清彻映冰壶，螺黛轻描付玉奴。多少画眉京兆笔，春山合让马双珠。徐陵架上旧珊瑚，西抹东涂兴不孤。题遍春江花共月，咏怀时系马双珠。五葺南阳生和韵曰：琵琶斜倚唱巴，胜似当筵处士竽。吕到沪滨花万朵，芳名总让马双珠。芙蓉为脸玉为肤，遍体凝脂润若酥。暂落红尘遭小劫，泥涂谁出马双珠。现住兆富里，有妹巧珠，颇惹人怜，其后来之秀欤？

    Explanation

    652

    A guest who saw things through a haze once drank in her room, and at the banquet, he offered the following verse: "The painted pavilion opens a jade banquet tonight, and the jade statue is graceful in her prime." Upon hearing the flower drum tune of the eastern region, he realized that she had her own family tradition. Fengzhu has already married, and Qiao Zhu is younger; only the double pearls are the most lovable. Having seen ten thousand flowers on the shores of Shanghai, the red and green hues do not make it feel like spring. Another guest bidding farewell to spring offered: "The lotus is clear and bright, reflecting like an ice pot; the green eyebrow makeup is lightly drawn upon the jade maiden." How many brushes of the capital's beauty apply eyebrow makeup? The spring mountains should yield to the double pearls of Ma. On Xu Ling's shelf, there are old corals; the enthusiasm for painting and writing in various directions is not solitary. Inscribing everywhere the spring river, flowers, and moon, and expressing thoughts often tied to the double pearls of Ma. Wu Qi from Nanyang composed in harmony: "The pipa leans, singing of Ba; it is better than the scholar's bamboo flute at the banquet." Lu arrived at the shores of Shanghai with ten thousand flowers; her beautiful name always yields to the double pearls of Ma. Her face is like a lotus, her skin like jade, and all over her body is smooth and moist like butter. Temporarily fallen into the world of human affairs, suffering a minor calamity, who will emerge from the mud as the double pearls of Ma? She currently resides in Zhao Fu Li, has a sister named Qiao Zhu, who is quite endearing, and is she the talented or beautiful person of the future?

    653

    胡宝玉小记
    　　
    　　不随群卉斗芳研，墨点绯衣楚楚怜。君子好逑侬好合，合成百美续新编。胡宝玉，初名林黛玉，居新公兴。桃花颊浅，柳叶眉浓；瑰资琼质，仪态横生；好作靓妆，性又放诞；于浓烟艳粉中，别树一帜。先是伶人某者，天津旦中好身手也，一见心倾。昔人所谓“郎如六月莲，妾似三年艾。”彼此爱恋，情逾胶漆。既而伶人因事返赵，姬则一日三秋，梦魂飞越；于是不惮重洋，惟挈一仆，千里航海，亲赴燕都。毋烦灵鹊填桥，而天孙自就于牵牛。彼都人士，一时传述；新闻纸上，曾为记之。流连数日，极朝朝暮暮之欢。忽焉梦醒长安，飘零北望；魂销短景，傺南归。乘轮舶而归来，僦玳梁兮营垒；香坛重整，艳曲三宣；车马填门，游人满座。锁云仙侣赠句云：玉箫声里步迟迟，南国佳人系我思。不分相逢花下语，镜边双锁远山眉。闻说年时忏绮怀，等闲不肯下香阶。

    Explanation

    653

    A Brief Note on Hu Baoyu

    Not competing with the common flowers for fragrance and beauty, she wears a red dress with black dots, exuding a delicate and charming grace. A gentleman seeks a suitable match, and so does she; together, they create a new and beautiful narrative. Hu Baoyu, originally named Lin Daiyu, lived in Xingong. Her cheeks were lightly blushed, her eyebrows dark and willow-like; she possessed exquisite beauty and a graceful demeanor. She enjoyed dressing up and had a free-spirited personality, standing out among the crowd of beautiful women. First, there was an actor from Tianjin, known for his excellent skills, who fell in love with her at first sight. As the ancients said, "He is like a lotus flower in June, and I am like a three-year-old mugwort plant." They loved each other deeply, their bond as inseparable as lacquer and wood. Later, the actor returned to Zhao due to some matter, and she missed him terribly, her dreams filled with longing. She was not afraid of the vast ocean and traveled alone with a servant, sailing thousands of miles to Yanjing. Without the need for the magpies to build a bridge, the Cowherd and Weaver Girl came together on their own. The people in the capital quickly spread the story, and it was reported in newspapers. They spent several days together, enjoying each other's company day and night. Suddenly, her dream ended, and she felt lonely, looking northward. Heartbroken, she decided to return south. She returned by ship and rented a place to stay; she revived her beauty and charm, possibly through performances or gatherings. Her place became popular again, with many visitors. A friend or admirer wrote a poem for her: "In the sound of a jade flute, her steps are slow, the southern beauty evokes my thoughts. Unspoken words under the flowers, her distant eyebrows locked in the mirror." She heard that the actor had confessed his love, but she was not willing to step down easily.

    654

    春风懒解鸳鸯，夜月羞簪玳瑁钗。别却红儿半载余，庸脂俗粉斗妆梳。得卿领袖团云队，始信春江茁玉渠。报道迷香洞再开，游蜂浪蝶费疑猜。相如消渴年来惯，莫遣乌龙作妒媒。二爱仙人花榜特科，评为“玉质金相”，赠句云：斯人端合住红楼，旧梦依稀在枕头。依样葫芦真即假，珊珊仙骨几生修。蠡湖小隐昵爱之，尝宴其家。室中牙签玉轴，宝鼎金炉；冷玉一秤，图书四壁。华丽而兼风雅，盖有人为之位置也。另辟精室一间，洁无纤尘，其中陈设，尽是西洋器具。以银光纸糊壁，地铺五彩绒毯。夏则西洋风扇，悬挂空中，凉生一室；冬则置外国火炉，奇燠异常。床亦系西式，不用帐幔，穷极奢华。姬虽年近季隗，而皮媚色艺，依然姣好，殆今之尤物欤！买雏环数辈，衣以锦绣，教之歌舞。有名秀林者，癸未秋季，余友柘湖渔郎，春申二十四鬟花榜，用殿一军，评为崔科，实后起之秀云。

    Explanation

    654

    Spring wind is lazy to untie the jade pendants, and night moon is shy to adorn the tortoiseshell hairpins. Parting from the red girl for more than half a year, common makeup and powder compete in dressing up. With you leading the cloud formation, I finally believe that the spring river nurtures jade channels. Reports say that the fragrant cave has reopened, and wandering bees and butterflies waste time in guessing. Sima Xiangru has been dealing with diabetes for years, so do not let the black dragon cause jealousy. The two beloved fairy people are in a special category on the flower list, and they are praised as "having the qualities of jade and gold," with a gift verse saying: "This person truly belongs in the red building, and old dreams vaguely linger on the pillow. Copying the gourd is true or false, and the graceful fairy bones have been refined over many lifetimes." The small seclusion in Lihu is loved by them, and a feast was held at their home. The room is filled with book markers and jade spines, precious tripods and golden incense burners; a cold, clear stone balance, and books on all four walls. It is both luxurious and elegant, and someone else arranges it. Another refined room was created, spotlessly clean, with all furnishings being Western-style items. The walls are papered with silver-colored paper, and the floor is covered with a colorful, soft rug. In summer, a Western-style fan hangs in the air, making the room cool; in winter, a foreign-style stove is placed, making the room unusually warm. The bed is also Western-style, without curtains or drapes, and it is extremely luxurious. Although the woman is getting old, her charming appearance and talent remain beautiful and attractive, making her a rare and beautiful thing! Several young women were bought, dressed in brocade or embroidery, and taught to dance and sing. There is a person named Xiu Lin, in the autumn of Gui Wei, my friend Zhehu Yuling, in the list of 24 beautiful women from Chunshen, who is praised as the top in the list, truly a rising star.
